module.name: cycle
module.description: Circular / looping process — stages arranged around a ring (unlike @process, which is a straight line). Body = one section per stage.
module.aiSpec:
A CIRCULAR / LOOPING process — stages arranged around a ring for cycles that repeat (PDCA, build-measure-learn, a lifecycle). Use @process for a one-way pipeline instead. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per stage (Markdown), placed clockwise from the top. Best with 3–6 short stages.
Parameters: • center (text, default empty) — label placed in the middle of the ring (Markdown). • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — accent for the ring and node borders. • size (select: sm | md | lg, default md) — diameter of the diagram (340 / 440 / 560 px). • direction (select: clockwise | counter, default clockwise) — order stages run around the ring. • numbered (boolean, default false) — show a step number badge on each stage.
Example: <!-- @cycle center: **PDCA**, numbered: true --> Plan <!-- @ --> Do <!-- @ --> Check <!-- @ --> Act <!-- @end -->

param.name: center
param.label: Center label
param.desc: Label placed in the middle of the ring (Markdown)

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Accent for the ring and node borders

param.name: direction
param.label: Direction
param.desc: Order stages run around the ring

param.name: numbered
param.label: Numbered
param.desc: Show a step number badge on each stage

snippet.label: Cycle (loop)
snippet.description: Stages arranged clockwise around a ring; optional center label.
